client_id.description: Chift OAuth client ID; used to obtain a session access token via POST /token. Never logged.

client_secret.description: Chift OAuth client secret; used to obtain a session access token via POST /token. Never logged.

account_id.description: Chift account ID sent in the session-token exchange request body. Never logged.

base_url.description: Chift API base URL override for tests or proxies.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
